products.name: Non-Stick Frying Pan
products.detail: A everyday frying pan built for parathas, eggs and stir-fries. The reinforced non-stick coating means less oil and easier cleanup, while the flat base spreads heat evenly across gas, induction and electric stoves.

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.comment: Perfect size for daily cooking, nothing sticks even on high heat.

reviews.name: Ramesh Patel
reviews.comment: Good quality, handle gets slightly warm after long use but overall happy.

products.name: Stainless Steel Kadhai
products.detail: A deep, heavy-gauge kadhai for frying, curries and everyday tadka. The wide mouth and sturdy handles make it easy to stir large batches without splashing.
features: Deep design, ideal for frying & curries

reviews.name: Anjali Verma
reviews.comment: Sturdy build, doesn't discolour even after regular use.

reviews.name: Suresh Nair
reviews.comment: Heavy in a good way — heats evenly, easy to clean.

products.name: Pressure Cooker 5L
products.detail: A reliable 5 litre pressure cooker for dal, rice and everyday meals. The inner-lid design seals tightly for consistent, safe pressure cooking every time.
features: Inner lid design for better sealing

reviews.name: Kavita Iyer
reviews.comment: Cooks rice and dal fast, whistle is consistent and safe.

reviews.name: Vikram Singh
reviews.comment: Works fine but gasket needed replacing after a few months.

products.name: Kitchen Knife Set (5pc)
products.detail: Five essential knives — chef, bread, utility, paring and cleaver — for every kitchen task, presented in a compact wooden stand that keeps your counter tidy.

reviews.name: Neha Gupta
reviews.comment: Sharp straight out of the box, stand looks neat on the counter.

reviews.name: Arjun Reddy
reviews.comment: Great value for a 5-piece set, cuts vegetables cleanly.

products.name: Mixer Grinder 750W
products.detail: A powerful 750W mixer grinder with three jars for chutneys, batters and dry grinding. Built with a durable copper motor and overload protection for long life.

reviews.name: Meera Joshi
reviews.comment: Grinds idli batter smoothly, motor doesn't heat up quickly.

reviews.name: Rohit Mehta
reviews.comment: Powerful machine, a bit noisy but does the job well.

products.name: Steel Dinner Set (24pc)
products.detail: A complete 24-piece stainless steel dinner set for a family of six, with a mirror finish that stays shiny wash after wash.

reviews.name: Sneha Desai
reviews.comment: Beautiful finish, feels premium and washes up easily.

reviews.name: Amit Kumar
reviews.comment: Good set for the price, packaging was secure.

products.name: Copper Water Bottle
products.detail: A handcrafted pure copper bottle that follows the Ayurvedic practice of storing water in copper vessels overnight. Leak-proof cap makes it travel-friendly too.

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.comment: Water tastes noticeably better, bottle looks elegant on the desk.

reviews.name: Vikram Singh
reviews.comment: Good quality copper, just remember to hand wash it.

products.name: Wooden Chopping Board
products.detail: A solid neem wood chopping board with a naturally antibacterial surface, finished with a juice groove to keep countertops clean while you cook.

reviews.name: Anjali Verma
reviews.comment: Sturdy, doesn't slip on the counter, exactly as described.

reviews.name: Rohit Mehta
reviews.comment: Solid board, developed a small crack after months of heavy use.

products.name: Airtight Storage Set (6pc)
products.detail: Six modular, airtight jars that stack neatly in your pantry, keeping grains, snacks and spices fresh for longer.

reviews.name: Kavita Iyer
reviews.comment: Seals well, keeps snacks crunchy for weeks.

reviews.name: Meera Joshi
reviews.comment: Stacks perfectly in my pantry shelf, very handy set.

products.name: 2-Burner Gas Stove
products.detail: A reliable 2-burner gas stove with a toughened glass top that wipes clean instantly, and brass burners for a steady, even flame.
features: Toughened glass top, easy to clean

reviews.name: Suresh Nair
reviews.comment: Flame is even on both burners, glass top cleans in seconds.

reviews.name: Neha Gupta
reviews.comment: Sturdy stove, installation was quick with the manual provided.

products.name: Wooden Rolling Pin (Belan)
products.detail: A traditional sheesham wood rolling pin with tapered ends, giving you better control for rolling out even, round rotis and parathas.

reviews.name: Sneha Desai
reviews.comment: Smooth finish, rolls dough evenly without sticking.

reviews.name: Amit Kumar
reviews.comment: Good weight and grip, does the job well.

products.name: Non-Stick Tawa
products.detail: A flat 28cm tawa built for crisp dosas and soft rotis, with a non-stick surface that spreads heat evenly and needs very little oil.
features: Flat design perfect for dosa & roti

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.comment: Dosas come off perfectly, no sticking at all.

reviews.name: Arjun Reddy
reviews.comment: Great tawa for the price, heats up quickly.

products.name: Masala Dabba (Spice Box)
products.detail: A traditional 7-compartment masala dabba to keep your everyday spices organised and within easy reach, with a clear lid so you can see what's inside at a glance.

reviews.name: Kavita Iyer
reviews.comment: Keeps all my daily spices in one place, lid seals well.

reviews.name: Sneha Desai
reviews.comment: Good size, wish the compartments were a touch deeper.

products.name: Idli Steamer Stand (4-plate)
products.detail: A 4-plate idli stand that fits most pressure cookers and steamers, letting you steam soft idlis for the whole family in one batch.

reviews.name: Meera Joshi
reviews.comment: Idlis come out soft and fluffy, fits my cooker perfectly.

reviews.name: Rohit Mehta
reviews.comment: Good quality steel, plates stack neatly for storage.

products.name: Vegetable Chopper (Hand-Press)
products.detail: A hand-press vegetable chopper that dices onions, tomatoes and vegetables in seconds, with a stainless steel blade grid and no electricity needed.

reviews.name: Anjali Verma
reviews.comment: Saves so much time chopping onions, easy to clean too.

reviews.name: Suresh Nair
reviews.comment: Sturdy build, works well on most vegetables.

products.name: Digital Kitchen Weighing Scale
products.detail: A digital kitchen scale for accurate measuring while baking or portioning ingredients, with a clear LCD display and auto shut-off to save battery.

reviews.name: Neha Gupta
reviews.comment: Very accurate, perfect for my baking measurements.

reviews.name: Vikram Singh
reviews.comment: Does the job well, display could be a bit bigger.

products.name: Insulated Casserole (Hot Pot) 1.5L
products.detail: An insulated casserole that keeps rotis and rice warm for hours, with a sturdy outer shell and an airtight inner lid.
features: Airtight inner lid locks in heat

reviews.name: Sneha Desai
reviews.comment: Rotis stay warm and soft for hours, great for family dinners.

reviews.name: Amit Kumar
reviews.comment: Good quality, a bit bulky but works as promised.

products.name: Steel Sauce Pan Set (3pc Pateela)
products.detail: A set of 3 nesting stainless steel sauce pans (pateela) in different sizes, perfect for boiling milk, cooking dal, or making tea.

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.comment: Great set, the sizes are perfect for daily cooking.

reviews.name: Ramesh Patel
reviews.comment: Good quality steel, nesting design saves shelf space.
